query: SELECT DATE(createdAt) as call_date, COUNT(*) as count FROM calls WHERE isArchived = 'false' GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY call_date DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT DATE(createdAt) as call_date, COUNT(*) as count FROM calls WHERE isArchived = 'false' GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY call_date DESC LIMIT 10;
